bounded_scope: Extend the protected-record access audit matrix to /api/submissions/:id/submit without direct Figma work.
changes: /api/submissions/:id/submit now audits missing-session submit attempts as submission_submit_unauthorized.
Cross-student and staff submit attempts now audit submission_submit_denied with reason student_scope_denied plus redacted actor role scopes.
Missing-evidence submit blockers now audit submission_submit_blocked_missing_evidence with reason, evidence count, status, and actor role scopes.
Successful submit audits now include studentId, evidenceCount, status transition, version, and actor role scopes.
tests/review-loop.integration.test.mjs covers unauthorized, denied, missing-evidence blocked, and successful submit audits alongside the end-to-end review loop.
tests/production-workflow-source.test.mjs locks submission_submit_unauthorized and actorRoleScopes markers.
